name: Statuspage
description: Statuspage by Atlassian provides public and private status pages for communicating real-time service availability. Manage pages, components, incidents (realtime, scheduled, historical), subscribers, and metrics through a comprehensive REST API.

capabilities.name: pages_list
capabilities.description: List all status pages in your organization with their name, URL, subdomain, and branding configuration.

capabilities.name: components_list
capabilities.description: List all components on a status page. Components represent individual services whose status is tracked independently.

capabilities.name: component_update
capabilities.description: Update the operational status of a specific component (operational, degraded_performance, partial_outage, major_outage, under_maintenance).

capabilities.name: incidents_list
capabilities.description: List all incidents on a status page including their current status, affected components, and update history.

capabilities.name: incidents_list_unresolved
capabilities.description: List only unresolved incidents on a status page, filtering out resolved ones.

capabilities.name: incidents_list_scheduled
capabilities.description: List only scheduled maintenance incidents on a status page.

capabilities.name: incident_create
capabilities.description: Create a new realtime incident on a status page to communicate an ongoing issue with affected components, severity, and notification options.

capabilities.name: incident_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing incident with a new status, message, or affected component changes. Post progress updates or resolve incidents.

capabilities.name: incident_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete an existing incident from a status page.

capabilities.name: subscribers_list
capabilities.description: List all subscribers to a status page who receive notifications about incidents and maintenance events via email, SMS, Slack, or webhook.
